'''鈭歬-k-zh-k''' ('''kakakzhekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embattle|embattle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embattle|embattle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-k-zh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kakakzhekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikakzhekoko|thikakzhekoko]] || [[word:jikakzhekoko|jikakzhekoko]] || [[word:shikakzhekoko|shikakzhekoko]] || [[word:kikakzhekoko|kikakzhekoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
